top_signals.title: Deadliest China Coal Mine Blast Since 2009 Kills at Least 90
top_signals.summary: The death toll from a gas explosion at a coal mine in China’s Shanxi province has jumped to at least 90 people, making it the country’s deadliest such incident since 2009.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
